CIDR Cheat Sheet  internal network planning reference
======================================================

Prefix  Mask               Total IPs   Usable Hosts   Common Use
------  -----------------  ----------  -------------  ----------------------------
/16     255.255.0.0            65536          65534    VPC root
/18     255.255.192.0          16384          16382    Very large tier
/20     255.255.240.0           4096           4094    Large subnet / AZ tier
/22     255.255.252.0           1024           1022    Medium subnet
/24     255.255.255.0            256            254    Small service subnet
/26     255.255.255.192           64             62    Bastion / NAT pool
/28     255.255.255.240           16             14    TGW attachment / endpoint

Rule of thumb: pick the smallest prefix whose Usable Hosts column is >= your
target instance count, then add at least one binary doubling for headroom.
